name: Pendulum Encore
name_jp: ペンデュラム・アンコール
desc: During your opponent's Main Phase: You can discard 1 card; immediately after this effect resolves, Pendulum Summon a Pendulum Monster(s), also for the rest of this turn after this card resolves, cards in your Pendulum Zones cannot activate their effects and cannot be destroyed by your card effects, also, shuffle them into the Deck during the End Phase. You can only activate 1 "Pendulum Encore" per turn.
eff: During your opponent's Main Phase: You can discard 1 card; immediately after this effect resolves, Pendulum Summon a Pendulum Monster(s), also for the rest of this turn after this card resolves, cards in your Pendulum Zones cannot activate their effects and cannot be destroyed by your card effects, also, shuffle them into the Deck during the End Phase. You can only activate 1 "Pendulum Encore" per turn.

action: Returns from your field to your Deck
mst: Prevents activation of your Spell Cards
Cannot be destroyed by card effects
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
